testModifications.reasoning: No test modifications detected. EntityStore integration tests and HybridRetriever integration tests are original.

criteria.criterion: AC1: EntityStore.indexEntity(projectId, entity) stores the entity and its linked source + sourceId references, then makes it searchable by searchEntities()
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:31-38 indexEntity stores entity with source/sourceId; searchEntities at :40-60 retrieves by label

criteria.criterion: AC2: EntityStore.searchEntities(projectId, 'auth') returns entities with 'auth' in the label or tags
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:44-56 checks labelMatch (labelLower.includes) and queryTerms match against tags

criteria.criterion: AC3: EntityStore.getByTag(projectId, 'backend') returns all entities tagged 'backend'
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:62-73 filters entities by tag (case-insensitive) and returns with score 1

criteria.criterion: AC4: Entity score is computed as |query_terms ∩ entity.tags| / |entity.tags|, and is 0 when there is no overlap
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:81-93 computeEntityScore implements intersectionSize / entityTags.length; returns 0 for empty query/tags

criteria.criterion: AC5: Entity score only boosts candidate documents linked to the matched entity, and unrelated candidate documents receive entityScore = 0
criteria.evidence: hybrid-retriever.service.ts:344-346 - docEntity is found by sourceId match; if not found (unrelated doc), entityScore = 0

criteria.criterion: AC6: Entities from graphify nodes with type code_module are indexed when the graphify_import outbox event fires
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:103-119 handleOutboxEvent filters node.type === 'code_module' and calls indexEntity

criteria.criterion: AC7: Entities from tickets with type ticket are indexed when the ticket_event outbox event fires
criteria.evidence: entity-store.ts:120-139 handleOutboxEvent extracts ticket from payload and indexes with source='ticket'

reasoning: All 58 tests pass (34 entity-store integration + 24 hybrid-retriever integration). Implementation is clean with proper TypeScript typing, error handling, and follows existing patterns. Entity scoring correctly boosts only linked documents via sourceId matching. Outbox event handlers properly index code_module and ticket entities. Lint and type-check pass.
